diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,141 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and provides routing with SmartRouter by default
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter in its router array
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base Hono class providing request handling, middleware support, and core functionality
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoRequest, Context, Composition, Middleware, FetchEventInfo, ErrorHandler, onError, compose, getHead, req, request, get, post, put, patch, delete, option, any, use, on, NotFoundError, methodNotAllowedError, getBasePath, setBasePath, notFound, methodNotAllowed, all
+- Simple note: Implements the HTTP request-response lifecycle with middleware composition and error handling
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router that compiles routes into compiled regular expressions at registration time
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, endsWithWildcard, match, exec, groups, params
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regex once on add() and stores compiled patterns indexed by method for fast matching
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
+- Names notice d: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter for preparing routes to avoid recompilation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Core RegExpRouter implementation using Trie and Matcher for dynamic route compilation
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Trie, Matcher, MatcherMap, Matcher, ParamIndexMap, StaticMap, Route, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, pathErrorCheckOnly, paths, preparePath, buildAllMatchers, build, init, routesWithStaticPathFlag, insert, buildStr, buildRegExp, match, handlerIndex, pathIndex, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, match, exec, groups, index
+- Simple note: Routes first get compiled into a static Matcher (regex+handlers) which is then used for fast matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Provides optimized matcher function that uses buildAllMatchers to cache compiled regexes
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, match, matchers, buildAllMatchers, staticMatch, exec, indexOf, handler, index, captureGroups
+- Simple note: Builds all matchers once, then uses cached matcher per HTTP method with static lookup fallback
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tree node class representing nodes in the route trie with methods for insert and build
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, ParamAssocItem, path, mark, varIndex, insert, restTokens, depth, buildRegExpStr, hash, children, handler, handlerIndex, param, name, paramMap, paramIndex, isParam, isCatchAll
+- Simple note: Each node has children, methods, and handlers; tracks param associations for group ID generation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class for building and compiling the route tree into optimized RegExp
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ReplacementMap, paramAssocArray, insert, path, mark, group, token, regexp, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, hash, buildRegExp, buildRegExpStr, replace
+- Simple note: Replaces parameter captures with numeric group markers (\\@n) before converting to regex
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Hybrid router that tries simple routes first and falls back to other routers
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, routes, add, match, routers, i, res, push, fallback, error, activeRouter, name
+- Simple note: Pre-adds routes to first router; if it works, delegates to it; otherwise tries other routers
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with O(1) lookup after routing tree construction
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, method, path, handler, insert, results, children, search, params, score
+- Simple note: Routes are organized as a tree keyed by HTTP method with longest-prefix matching on paths
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class for trie router that implements tree structure and path matching
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, params, children, methods, insert, search, method, path, handler, handlerSet, matchPath, pathParts, depth, matchResult
+- Simple note: Each node has children and handlers; insert traverses tree, search traverses matching branches with score tracking
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test suite runner for router comparisons
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, RunnerOptions, getSuiteHierarchy, runTest, skip, newRouter, describe, Match, router, match, beforeEach, task, taskName, taskContext, context, matchRoute, expect
+- Simple note: Test runner that adapts the test suite based on the router being tested
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter including edge cases like duplicate params and trailing slashes
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, skip, self, get /:id/:id, Duplicate param name, get /book /, get /book /id
+- Simple note: PatternRouter supports trailing slash normalization but cannot handle duplicate param names
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter including unsupported path scenarios and multi-match failures
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, skip, reason, Multi match, params per a handler, GET /entry/123/show, Capture regex pattern, Complex, Parameter with regexp, Trailing slash, Skip part, GET /products /list, GET /products :id
+- Simple note: LinearRouter can fail on complex multi-match paths but handles single trailing slashes correctly
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Comprehensive tests for RegExpRouter covering all edge cases and parameter types
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, skip, reason, UnsupportedPath, Duplicate param, Complex param, Catch-all, Optional, Trailing slash, Nested param, Regexp param, Named groups, Capture groups, get /foo, get /:p, get /:p/foo, get /:p{a,b}, get /:p{a+,b++}, get /@n, Capture group > GET /{name}, Capture > GET /foo({bar}), UnsupportedPath > GET /foo({}), Capture > GET /foo/{foo}, Capture group > GET /foo({a,b}), Capture > GET /foo({a,b,c}), Capture group > GET /{a,b,c,d,e}, Capture > GET /foo/:a/b/c/:d, Named group > /([a-zA-Z]+)(\d{4}), Match > /([a-zA-Z]+) (\d{4}), Match > /([a-zA-Z]+) (?P<year>\d{4}), Named group > foo/(?<bar>\d)
+- Simple note: Tests parameter patterns, regex captures, named groups, path constraints, and error cases
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter showing fallback behavior to other routers
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, routers, activeRouter, fallback, routerName, name
+- Simple note: SmartRouter delegates to the first router that can handle the route without errors
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter covering all path and method scenarios
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, get /, get /book, get /posts, get /posts/:id, get /foo/bar, get /foo/:p, get /foo/:p/bar, get /foo/:p/bar/:q, get /foo/:p(*)
+- Simple note: TrieRouter handles exact matches, parameters, wildcards, and hierarchical paths efficiently
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Node class in trie router implementation
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, insert, search, root, child, grandchild, param, wildcard, method, handlers, children, search, get, post
+- Simple note: Tests trie node insert/search mechanics including regular paths and parameter paths
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a reading ledger document for a benchmark task. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create a markdown document with specific sections for each file

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files in parallel since this is a read-heavy task.
